package main
import "fmt"
import "math"
func main() {
    var x1, y1, x2, y2, d float64
    fmt.Scan(&x1, &y1, &x2, &y2)
    d = math.Sqrt(math.Pow(x2 - x1, 2) + math.Pow(y2 - y1, 2))
    fmt.Printf("%.2f\n", d)
}
